title: Tristania suaveolens
taxonomy: Tristania suaveolens is a species of plant in the family Myrtaceae. This family is commonly known as the myrtle family. Members of the Myrtaceae family are typically shrubs or small trees that are native to tropical and subtropical regions of the world. Tristania suaveolens is native to Australia and is often found growing in coastal areas. The plant's classification within the Myrtaceae family provides insight into its evolutionary relationships with other species in the same family.
